prose.title: 68d mos
prose.body: The 68D MOS (Military Occupational Specialty) is a Biomedical Equipment Specialist in the United States Army. As a 68D, you would be responsible for maintaining and repairing medical equipment used in Army medical facilities. This could include tasks such as calibrating equipment, troubleshooting malfunctions, and conducting preventative maintenance. It is a critical role in ensuring that medical equipment is functioning properly to support the healthcare needs of military personnel.
